benefits.description: Glucagon component helps with fat mobilization on top of GLP-1 appetite suppression; body composition results tend to be better than semaglutide alone
Better muscle retention during fat loss compared to semaglutide

protocol_notes: Commenter recommending 2mg weekly starting dose with slow titration. Emphasizes that muscle retention during deficit is primarily dependent on protein intake (0.7-1g per lb bodyweight), not the peptide choice. Notes that appetite suppression may make intentional protein consumption challenging.
